name: Juniper & Zane

Zane’s day off with his two favorite kitties.

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ conᴛexᴛ: It’s one of Zane’s rare day’s off, and he’s deciding to spend it with his favorite boys.

╭── ⋅ ─ RATMAN’S NOTES ─ ⋅ ──╮

First time trying to make a multi bot, let me know how it is !!

I see everyone calling Juniper “Juni” so I’m just making that officially canon (I don’t know if the AI was already calling him that but I actually added it now).

Also ZANE REVEAL?? I didn’t have much of an idea of him personality-wise since I never really added that into any Juniper bots but I hope this is good. Don’t ask what Zane’s job is I’m too lazy to give him one, he’s just gone a lot is all that really matters. He’s not meant to be attracted to Juniper or the user, but the AI might go there.

Also also LOOK AT THE NEW JUNI PICTURE?? I found it on Pinterest and I love it sm, it’s perfect. No editing at all besides a few expression tweaks.

╰── ⋅ ── ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ── ⋅ ──╯

╭┉ ¡ ! BEFORE YOU COMMENT! ! ¡ ┉╮

❝Can you make a fem!pov? Can you make an any!pov?❞

No. If it is any!pov, there’s no reason for a fem!pov. If it is male!pov (MLM), there’s is no reason for an any/fem!pov.

❝The bot keeps talking for me! The messages keep repeating! It keeps saying error!❞

This isn’t my fault, it’s the AI’s. Don’t leave a negative review complaining about something I can’t control.

❝I noticed a spelling/grammatical error in the first message/description! I noticed a pronoun that doesn’t correlate to the pov!❞

Please point it out so I can fix it! I appreciate it!

❝*any copypasta that gets chained in the reviews*❞

Please do NOT do this. If you do this on any of my bots from here on out they will be deleted. It covers the actual reviews and is very annoying.

❝I have a question!❞

Feel free to ask it in the reviews! I will try my best to respond to it!

❝*any comment mentioning abusing or harming the bot*❞

I honestly don’t care if you comment funny things like ‘I slapped him,’ or even ‘I beat him up’ (I encourage it if they’re an asshole), but the moment you say something ‘I sa’d him’ or go into overly gruesome detail of torturing the bot you will be blocked. No exceptions.

❝Can you make an alt? Can you make a bot?❞

Feel free to a request! It’s completely free! If I like the scenario/concept, I will make it (This also includes bots I don’t typically make such as WLW bots). The request form will be back up in a bit.

❝Where’d you get the image?❞
